commentary_text: The model favors Australia at 44%, while sportsbooks and Polymarket both favor Paraguay at 44% and 44% respectively. On the Australia win specifically, the model is 16 percentage points higher than the consensus books, but on Paraguay's chances the model sits 19 percentage points lower. This opposing shift could reflect recent form, injury developments, or lineup changes that emerged after the model's last update but are now reflected in real-money markets. The dashboard flags this as a signal worthy of attention rather than a judgment on which forecast is more reliable.
